title: Record whether the container has exited
body: Use this to supplement exit codes returned from containers, to make sure we know when exit codes are invalid (as the container has not yet exited)

comments.body: You still have podman instpect showing some bogus data when running a container for a second time correct, if the first container exited with a bad status?
No - restart now resets exit code to 0
That should match Docker behavior
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 35b7a87) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Added the information to ps, along with some major fixes to `ps --format=json` output.
LGTM
@baude @umohnani8 @giuseppe @vrothberg PTAL
Hold off on merge for a second, going to clean up --format=json a bit more
Alright, changes should be done. Made some changes to --format=json container size printing - now it's in a separate struct, and only printed if we explicitly ask for size with `ps --size`
@baude @umohnani8 @giuseppe @vrothberg PTAL
